labs.clinicalContext: Monitor for hypovolemia and volume depletion

labRequirements.specialPopulationNotes: Do not initiate when eGFR <20 ml/min/1.73m2. Continue until dialysis or transplantation initiated. Not adequately studied in kidney transplant recipients. Withhold during prolonged fasting, surgery, or critical medical illness.
labRequirements.sourceSnippet: We recommend treating patients with type 2 diabetes (T2D), CKD, and an eGFR ≥20 ml/min per 1.73 m² with an SGLT2i (1A). Anticipate acute eGFR drop after initiating SGLT2i; this is not a reason to discontinue treatment. Measure both blood glucose and blood ketone levels on hospital admission (proceed with procedure/surgery if the patient is clinically well and ketones are <1.0 mmol/L).

governance.sourceDocument: KDIGO 2022 Clinical Practice Guideline for Diabetes Management in Chronic Kidney Disease
